name: Macaroni Con Queso
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the macaroni according to package instructions until al dente.
2. Drain and set aside.
3. In a large saucepan, sauté chopped tomatoes in a bit of oil until softened.
4. Add cilantro and cook for an additional minute.
5. Gradually stir in shredded cheese until melted and smooth.
6. Taste and adjust seasoning if needed.
7. Serve the macaroni over crushed tortilla chips.
